content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — user-visible UI string labels a shipped feature as "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" (App/SettingsView.swift:12), which may trigger review questions about completeness
Pierre: Guideline 2.2 rejects builds that present themselves as unfinished, and reviewers do tap through settings screens. The store metadata (description.txt, release_notes.txt) is clean, but the AI Sort toggle's caption explicitly calls the feature experimental and unstable, which reads as beta-quality copy in a production build. Consider rewording to a neutral disclosure (e.g. "AI Sort may occasionally change ordering") or removing the "Experimental"/"unstable" wording before submission.
